title: Plea in Supreme Court challenges Deepak Prakash's reappointment as Bihar Minister despite remaining unelected
description: A petition has been filed before the Supreme Court challenging the reappointment of Bihar Panchayati Raj Minister Deepak Prakash, who continues to hold ministerial office despite not being a member of either House of the State Legislature [Rakesh Kumar Singh v. State of Bihar & Ors]The petition has sought directions calling upon Prakash to explain the legal and constitutional basis on which he continues to hold the office of Bihar's Panchayati Raj Minister.
